raw_consumer_statement: I had a fraudulent charge for {$130.00} on my XX/XX/year> Citibank card bill. I called to file a dispute and they told me to pay the bill and they would investigate, which I did. They sent me a reimbursement check but added the amount back onto my account the next month. I have called several times with no resolution. Now i am being charged late fees and interest. When i call, they can never find my account and nothing is done except send me another bill. I did not order or receive what i was billed for in XXXX. They have offered no explanation of what they are doing and have no record of my numerous calls to them. Their security department has done nothing when i speak with them. I have called at least 5 times, spoken with supervisors, etc. Nobody knows or does a thing! Now with interest and late fees, the amount owed is about {$250.00}.
